Notice And Motion For Judgment To Correct Due Date Mistake Under Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carol Brook (510-846-5904) appears as plaintiff/moving party In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CAROL BROOK'S Motion For Judgment To Correct Due Date Mistake Under Nunc Pro Tunc is Granted. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice And Motion For Judgment To Correct Due Date Mistake Under Nunc Pro Tunc

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Plaintiff Carol Brook appears In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter. Court instructs plaintiff to file new notice of hearing. PLAINTIFF CAROL BROOK'S Motion For Judgment To Correct Due Date Mistake Under Nunc Pro Tunc is continued to September 14, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
